component.name: NetBox MCP Server
component.summary: Read-only MCP server for NetBox infrastructure data

description.p: NetBox MCP Server is a read-only Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that lets LLMs query NetBox infrastructure data. It is built with FastMCP and designed for use by NetBox operators.

It exposes NetBox's DCIM, IPAM, circuits, virtualization, tenancy, VPN, and wireless objects as read-only tools, so an LLM can look up devices, sites, IP addresses, VLANs, circuits, and related data without being able to modify anything. Only GET operations are exposed; no create, update, or delete tools are provided.
